description_long: This jewelry set features a beaded necklace and matching earrings displayed on a black stand. The necklace is composed of alternating cylindrical and spherical beads, predominantly in white and blue, interspersed with smaller red and black accent beads. The central section of the necklace is wider, with a rectangular beaded segment that serves as a focal point. The earrings are diamond-shaped and crafted from the same white and blue beads, creating a cohesive geometric pattern. The beads appear to be made of glass or plastic, giving the set a glossy and slightly translucent finish. The overall design is geometric and symmetrical, with a handcrafted, artisanal aesthetic.
description: A beaded necklace and matching diamond-shaped earrings in white, blue, red, and black, displayed on a black stand with a geometric, handcrafted design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace and both earrings, highlighting the geometric beadwork and color pattern.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the profile of the necklace and the thickness of the beaded segments.
description_view_2: Rear view showing mostly the back of the display stand, with minimal visibility of the jewelry itself.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and bead arrangement along the necklace.
